children.text: Each cost-of-living annuity increase under this section shall be identical to the corresponding percentage increase under .section 8340(b) of title 5

A cost-of-living increase made under paragraph (1) shall become effective under this section on the effective date of each such increase under . Except as provided in subsection (b), each such increase shall be applied to each annuity payable from the fund which has a commencing date not later than the effective date of the increase.section 8340(b) of title 5

children.label: A
children.text: ⁄ of the applicable percent change computed under subsection (a), multiplied by112

children.label: i
children.text: for which the annuity was payable from the fund before the effective date of the increase, or

children.label: ii
children.text: in the case of a surviving spouse, former spouse, previous spouse, or insurable interest designee of a deceased annuitant whose annuity has not been so increased, since the annuity was first payable to the deceased annuitant.

Effective from its commencing date, an annuity payable from the fund to an annuitant’s survivor (other than a child entitled to an annuity under ) shall be increased by the total percentage increase the annuitant was receiving under this section at death.section 2031(d) of this title

For purposes of computing the annuity of a child under that commences after , the dollar amounts specified in shall each be increased by the total percentage increases allowed and in force under this section on or after such day and, in the case of a deceased annuitant, the percentages specified in that section shall be increased by the total percent allowed and in force to the annuitant under this section on or after such day.section 2031(d) of this titlesection 2031(d)(3) of this titleOctober 31, 1969

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: An annuity increase provided by this section may not be computed on any additional annuity purchased at retirement by voluntary contributions.

children.heading: Rounding to next lower dollar
children.label: d Rounding to next lower dollar
children.text: The monthly annuity installment, after adjustment under this section, shall be rounded to the next lowest dollar, except that such installment shall, after adjustment, reflect an increase of at least $1.

children.heading: Limitation on maximum amount of annuity
children.label: e Limitation on maximum amount of annuity
A
children.text: the maximum pay payable for GS–15 30 days before the effective date of the adjustment under this section; or

children.label: i
children.text: beginning on the date on which the annuity commenced (or, in the case of a survivor of the retired participant, the date on which the participant’s annuity commenced), and

children.label: ii
children.text: ending on the effective date of the adjustment under this section.

children.heading: “Pay” defined
children.label: 2 “Pay” defined
children.text: For purposes of paragraph (1), the term “pay” means the rate of salary or basic pay as payable under any provision of law, including any provision of law limiting the expenditure of appropriated funds.
